---
title: "test"
subtitle: "Princeton University"
author: "Sebastian"
output: 
  tufte::tufte_html:
    css: 
    tufte_variant: "envisioned"
    highlight: github-dark
    fig_height: 10
    fig_width: 16
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
engine: knitr
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
df <- read.csv("ModelParamSummary.csv")
```
```{r}
head(df)
str(df)  # Check data types
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    task = factor(task),
    intuitive_direction = factor(intuitive_direction),
    intuitive_relevance = factor(intuitive_relevance),
    overfit = factor(overfit) 
  )
str(df)
```


```{r}
# Fit model
model_interaction3 <- glm(
  overfit ~ task * intuitive_direction * intuitive_relevance,
  data = df,
  family = binomial
)
summary(model_interaction3)
```
